title.en: Ye Tian was also a little surprised.

content.en:
Ye Tian's so-called method is to first let only one copy body cultivation be improved, and the other copy bodies remain unchanged, so that in the eyes of the outside world, his cultivation is still in the early stage of the second realm.

When he leaves the 6000 Territory in the future, and after a period of time, he will have no problem exposing his cultivation.

"Come in!"

Ye Tian let go of the restriction of the void in his body and let the Moon Realm Lord enter.

Wow!

Without the slightest hesitation, the Realm Lord of the Moon Realm directly entered the void in Ye Tian's body and healed the void in his body.

And due to the particularity of the Great Realm Armor Technique, the Moon Realm Lord was hiding in the void in Ye Tian's body, even if he encountered the existence of the Third Realm face-to-face, it would be difficult for the other party to discover the Moon Moon Realm Lord.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to hunt super-dimensional creatures, killing one super-dimensional creature after another, and then handing them over to the Lord of the Shangyue Realm.

I saw that the Lord of the Moon Realm took out a multi-dimensional treasure bottle, absorbed the flesh and blood of these extra-dimensional creatures, and condensed a drop of 24-dimensional essence in a short period of time.

"Here you go!"

The Lord of the Shangyue Realm gave Ye Tian some multi-dimensional essences, which was agreed upon by both parties, so naturally he couldn't rely on it.

"The multi-dimensional essence has been condensed so quickly!"

Ye Tian was also a little surprised.

The speed at which his multi-dimensional treasure bottle imitation condenses the multi-dimensional essence is very slow, and it is simply too far from the real multi-dimensional treasure bottle.

With these multi-dimensional essences, Ye Tian began to retreat and cultivate.

I saw him take out a drop of multi-dimensional essence and immediately swallow it for refining.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying multi-dimensional essence erupted and merged into his body, improving his cultivation at an incredible speed.

"This is a multi-dimensional essence that specializes in improving cultivation, and it is more powerful than the Eternal Essence I don't know how many times!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

According to this efficiency, it would not be long before he could raise his cultivation to the middle level of the second realm.

Really.

After a period of time, his cultivation had officially broken through to the middle stage of the second realm, and he had not yet finished refining the second drop of multidimensional essence.

"It is estimated that by refining ten drops of multi-dimensional essence, I can improve my cultivation to the late stage of the second realm!"

Immediately, Ye Tian continued to refine the multi-dimensional essence.

Time has passed since one extradimensional epoch after another.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation had already reached the late stage of the second realm, and if he went any further, he would be at the peak of the second realm.

So, he continued to cultivate, but if he wanted to raise his cultivation to the peak of the second realm, he needed to consume more multi-dimensional essence, at least fifty or sixty drops before there was hope.

Of course.

He can also hunt the extra-dimensional creatures of the second realm, so that the effect of the condensed multi-dimensional essence will be better, and the effect of improving cultivation will be even better.

This is also what the Moon Realm Lord told him.

"Lord of the Moon Realm, the higher the cultivation of the sacrificed extradimensional creatures, the better the effect of the condensed multidimensional essence. If it is a superdimensional creature that sacrifices to the third realm, wouldn't the multidimensional essence be helpful to the third realm?

"Yes!" the Moon Realm Lord nodded, "Whether it's healing, extra-dimensional rules, or multi-dimensional vases such as cultivation promotion, they all condense multi-dimensional essences of different grades according to the flesh and blood of the sacrifice. If the extradimensional creature you hunt is the second realm, then just a few drops can make your cultivation reach the peak of the second realm. However, after reaching the third realm, the strength of the super-dimensional realm and the physical body will usher in an unimaginable transformation, and the multi-dimensional essence condensed by the super-dimensional creatures in the second realm will be of little use. You can only hunt the extra-dimensional realm of the third realm, but the extra-dimensional realm of the third realm, whether it is a cultivator or those extra-dimensional creatures, it is difficult to kill, and it is even easy to provoke powerful enemies. "

Ye Tian nodded secretly, at this moment he also really understood why the multi-dimensional treasure bottle would make the existence of the fourth realm have to be snatched, the higher the cultivation of the original sacrificial super-dimensional creatures, the better the multi-dimensional essence condensed!

It seems that he has underestimated the value of the Duowei Treasure Bottle.

"So, does the Duowei Treasure Vase also help the Fourth Realm?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"It is said that there is some help, but the help is not so great, after all, the current multi-dimensional treasure bottle is only one hundredth of the real multi-dimensional treasure bottle, and it seems that the effect is not so good. If it is of great help to the fourth realm, then the fifth realm will be snatched. But for now, the Fifth Realm doesn't seem to be involved in snatching the Duowei Treasure Bottle. The Moon Realm Lord said.

Even if the fifth realm is useless and not very useful to the fourth realm, for one force, the value of any kind of multidimensional treasure bottle is unimaginable.

If you can collect a lot of multi-dimensional treasure bottles, you can definitely cultivate a huge extra-dimensional force far beyond the Blazing Sun Palace.

But if you don't have a strong enough force, you won't be able to keep so many multi-dimensional treasure bottles.

And without the strength of the forces, they can't collect so many multi-dimensional treasure bottles at all.

"Moon Realm Lord, how are your injuries?"

Ye Tian asked with concern. []

"It's still like that!" the Moon Realm Lord said helplessly: "The extradimensional realm in my body has been shattered, and the superdimensional Dao species have also been seriously damaged, unless I obtain a healing multidimensional treasure bottle, I can't heal my injuries at all, I can only barely suppress it." "

"Do you know where there is a healing multidimensional treasure bottle?" Ye Tian asked again. 400 "There is one in the Blazing Sun Palace, and it is said that it is on one of the Fourth Realms of the Blazing Yang Palace!"

On the Fourth Realm?

Ye Tian shook his head, he didn't have the strength to snatch the Duowei Treasure Bottle from the Fourth Realm, that was looking for death!

In the days that followed, he worked hard to refine the multi-dimensional essence and improve his cultivation.

In the blink of an eye, more than twenty extradimensional epochs have passed.

And he finally raised his cultivation to the peak realm of the second realm, and when he reached this realm, it was difficult for his cultivation to improve.

At this point, you can go to the third realm.

However, his current extra-dimensional rule realm is not high, and the probability of breaking through the third realm is naturally not too high.

However, if he tries to impact again and again, he will definitely be able to break through.

After chatting with the Lord of the Moon Realm, he was not ready to attack the third realm now.

Because according to what the Lord of the Moon Realm said, if the realm of extradimensional rules is not high, even if the impact on the third realm is successful, it will have some impact on the opening up of the transcendent realm, and there will be a certain obstacle to the future impact of the fourth realm.

The requirements for impacting the fourth realm are that the extradimensional Dao species must be perfect extradimensional Dao species, and the extradimensional rules must meet the requirements, so that the extradimensional realm opened up is the truly perfect extradimensional realm, and only then can it be qualified to impact the fourth realm.
